complaint: I ordered a blue sweater in size medium on the 15th and it's been 2 weeks with no tracking update. Your website says it should arrive in 5-7 business days. This is ridiculous!
Received my order today but the dress is a size 8 when I clearly ordered a size 6. I need this for an event this weekend, can you please send the correct size immediately?
The kitchen blender arrived completely shattered. Glass pieces were everywhere when I opened the box. I'd like a full refund or replacement ASAP.
I returned my boots 3 weeks ago and haven't seen the refund yet. My bank account still shows the charge. Order #789456 - please look into this.
Hi, I'm trying to log into my account but keep getting an error message saying 'invalid credentials.' I've reset my password twice and it's still not working. I can't access my order history.
Wrong item shipped - I ordered black Nike shoes but received white Adidas instead. Both are worth about the same, but I needed the Nikes specifically. What do I do?
My package was supposed to arrive yesterday but the tracking hasn't updated since it left the warehouse 5 days ago. Where is my order? This is unacceptable.
The phone case I ordered came with a huge crack down the middle. It's unusable. I'd like a refund since I can't use this product at all.
I purchased 2 items but was charged 3 times - my credit card shows three identical charges of $47.99 from yesterday. This was a mistake and I need this fixed immediately.
Ordered the winter jacket but received a summer shirt instead. Not only is this the wrong item, but I've already had to wait 10 days for delivery. I'm frustrated and want a proper resolution.
